all.en: The Sales Department is pleased to announce the Spring Sales Training Workshop.
all.zh: 業務部很高興宣布春季業務訓練工作坊即將舉行。

all.en: The two-day program will be held on March 18 and March 19.
all.zh: 為期兩天的課程將於 3 月 18 日及 19 日舉行。

all.en: All account managers and inside sales representatives are required to attend.
all.zh: 所有客戶經理與內部業務代表均須參加。

all.en: Sessions will take place in the third-floor training center at the Riverside Office.
all.zh: 課程將於濱河辦公室三樓的訓練中心舉行。

all.en: Day one will focus on consultative selling and customer needs analysis.
all.zh: 第一天聚焦於顧問式銷售與客戶需求分析。

all.en: Day two will cover negotiation techniques and closing strategies.
all.zh: 第二天將涵蓋談判技巧與成交策略。

all.en: Each morning begins with registration and coffee at eight thirty.
all.zh: 每日早上八點半開始報到並提供咖啡。

all.en: The opening remarks will be delivered by Sales Director Karen Liu.
all.zh: 開場致詞將由業務總監劉凱倫擔任。

all.en: Our first guest trainer is Mr. David Chen, author of Modern B2B Selling.
all.zh: 首位客座講師為《現代 B2B 銷售》一書的作者陳大偉先生。

all.en: He will lead an interactive session on building long-term client relationships.
all.zh: 他將帶領一場關於建立長期客戶關係的互動課程。

all.en: Participants will work in small groups to complete a live case study.
all.zh: 學員將分組進行實境案例研究。

all.en: A catered lunch will be served in the staff cafeteria at noon each day.
all.zh: 每天中午將在員工餐廳提供外燴午餐。

all.en: Afternoon sessions include role-play exercises with peer feedback.
all.zh: 下午課程包括角色扮演演練與同儕回饋。

all.en: Recordings of all sessions will be uploaded to the internal learning portal.
all.zh: 所有課程錄影將上傳至內部學習平台。

all.en: Attendees are encouraged to prepare two current sales scenarios in advance.
all.zh: 建議學員事先準備兩個目前的銷售情境。

all.en: A workbook and pricing simulator will be distributed at the start of day one.
all.zh: 第一天開始時將發放講義與報價模擬工具。

all.en: On day two, the closing keynote will be delivered by our regional vice president.
all.zh: 第二天的結業專題演講將由區域副總裁主講。

all.en: A short assessment will be administered at the end of the second afternoon.
all.zh: 第二天下午結束前將進行簡短的測驗。

all.en: Participants who pass will receive an internal certification valid for two years.
all.zh: 通過者將獲得效期兩年的內部認證。

all.en: Please register through the HR portal no later than March 10.
all.zh: 請於 3 月 10 日前透過人資入口網站完成報名。

all.en: Travel expenses for remote team members will be reimbursed per company policy.
all.zh: 外地團隊成員的差旅費將依公司規定核銷。

all.en: Dress code for both days is business casual.
all.zh: 兩天活動服裝規範均為商務休閒。

all.en: If you have dietary restrictions, please notify the organizers by March 5.
all.zh: 如有特殊飲食需求，請於 3 月 5 日前通知主辦單位。

all.en: Questions may be directed to the training coordinator at ext. 2412.
all.zh: 如有疑問，請洽訓練窗口分機 2412。

all.en: We look forward to a productive and engaging workshop with the entire team.
all.zh: 我們期待與全體團隊共度一場成效豐碩、互動熱絡的工作坊。

all.en: A pre-workshop survey will be sent to all participants next Monday morning.
all.zh: 工作坊前問卷將於下週一上午寄送給所有學員。

all.en: The survey collects current sales challenges to tailor the training content.
all.zh: 問卷將蒐集目前的銷售挑戰，以便客製化訓練內容。

all.en: Managers should review the pre-reading materials with their teams in advance.
all.zh: 主管應事先與團隊一同檢視預讀資料。

all.en: All training rooms have been equipped with new wireless presentation systems.
all.zh: 所有訓練教室已配備新的無線投影系統。

all.en: Light refreshments will be available during the mid-morning and afternoon breaks.
all.zh: 上午與下午休息時間將提供輕食點心。

all.en: Participants are reminded to bring their company laptops for the simulation exercises.
all.zh: 提醒學員攜帶公司筆電以進行模擬演練。

all.en: A networking dinner has been arranged at Lakeview Restaurant on the evening of day one.
all.zh: 第一天晚上已於湖景餐廳安排聯誼晚宴。

all.en: Attendance at the dinner is optional but strongly encouraged for new team members.
all.zh: 晚宴出席屬自由參加，但強烈鼓勵新進團隊成員參與。

all.en: Feedback forms will be collected electronically within one week after the workshop.
all.zh: 意見回饋表將於工作坊結束後一週內以電子方式蒐集。

all.en: We thank everyone in advance for their commitment to professional development.
all.zh: 我們預先感謝每一位對專業發展的投入與支持。
